tests.claim: structure is regionally concentrated in a tiny minority
tests.evidence: 50% needs 17 surahs (0.149123) — a minority, but not tiny; per-ayah density Gini=0.275388 is low (concentration is largely a length effect)

raw fingerprint homogeneity is high (mean cosine 0.834905 → one field); 54 weak discriminative clusters emerge (mean cohesion 0.461556); the only real specialization is functional: motif generation is concentrated in larger surahs
no single region removal breaks the hub or consistency (hub broken: False, consistency broken: False)
at 10% window, motif recovery 0.9375, hub-rank1 prob 1.0, consistency 1.0
